SpTU 1, 013 [unidentified incantation or ritual][via cams/gkab]

o i 1'o 1'

[...] x ⸢GIG⸣ x [...]

(o i 1') [...] ... [...].

o i 2'2'

EN₂ at-ta-man-nu munusUŠ₁₁.ZU ša₂ ki-ma DUMU-MEŠ LU₂ x x x x

(o i 2') Incantation. 'Whoever you are, sorceress, who ... like the sons of a man, (and who) has bound a binding of ....

o i 3'3'

ir-ku-su ri-ki-is ZI x

o i 4'4'

E x x-kim-ma GIM dTIR.AN.NA x tal-lak KASKAL?-MEŠ

(o i 4') '... to you and you go ... on journeys like a rainbow.

o i 5'5'

ri-⸢kis⸣-ki a-paṭ-ṭar pu-ḫur-ki a?-sap-⸢paḫ⸣

(o i 5') 'I loosen your binding. I scatter your assemblage.

o i 6'6'

a-paṭ-ṭar rik-si-ki ⸢IM?⸣ u₂-ma-al-la?

(o i 6') 'I loosen your bindings. I fill ....

o i 7'7'

mim-mu?-u₂ ⸢LA⸣ x MA? x LA PI MA? x x x x x TU? KI

(o i 7') 'All ....

o i 8'8'

ka-ši-⸢ma?⸣ ana-ku lu-⸢šir?⸣ ina? qi₂-bit? d⸢UTU? da?⸣-a-a-nu

(o i 8') '(Thus) you, (but) may I thrive at the command of Šamaš the judge.

o i 9'9'

el-⸢le⸣-ku eb-be₂-ku u za-⸢ka-ku te EN₂⸣

(o i 9') 'I am pure, I am bright and I am clean.' Incantation formula.

o i 10'10'

KA.INIM.MA UŠ₁₁.BUR₂.[RU.DA]-⸢KAM⸣

(o i 10') Wording of the ritual to dispel sorcery.

o i 11'11'

[KID₃].KID₃-BI x [x] x [x] x x [...] x

(o i 11') Its ritual procedure: ... [...] ... [...] ... [...] ....
